lore.excitingenchants.pitfall_trap: Can be placed on the ground to spike creatures that walk onto it.
lore.excitingenchants.curse_table: Uses Beetle horns to imbue items with curses. Uses golden horns to copy nearby curses.
lore.excitingenchants.ink_layer: Splotches on the ground. Slows you and splatters your screen when broken.
lore.excitingenchants.cloud_block: Cloud blocks that are only solid from above. Spawned by the Cloud Step enchantment.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_block: A Block that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_bricks: Bricks that were turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_brick_slab: A Brick Slab that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_brick_stari: Brick Stairs that were turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_brick_wall: A Wall that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.olden_log: A Log that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_planks: Planks that were turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_plank_slab: A wooden slab that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_plank_stari: Wood stairs that were turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_fence: A Fence that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_grass: A Plant that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.cursed_obsidian: A Block of Obsidian that has been infused with cursed energy.
lore.excitingenchants.golden_meat: Meat that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.cooked_golden_meat: Golden Meat that was turned to Gold by Midas Touch.
lore.excitingenchants.overgrown_swordspe: An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be repaired if the seaweed is cut off?
lore.excitingenchants.dull_swordspear: An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be repaired if reheated?
lore.excitingenchants.superheated_swords: HOT! An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be repaired if cooled down?
lore.excitingenchants.melleable_swordspe: An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be reforged on an anvil?
lore.excitingenchants.repaired_swordspea: An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be used if cooled down?
lore.excitingenchants.swordspear_blank: An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be repaired if reheated?
lore.excitingenchants.rusted_swordspear: An antique sword spear. Maybe it can be repaired if the rust is ground off?
lore.excitingenchants.swordspear: An antique sword spear. It works like a spear and like a sword.
lore.excitingenchants.bident: Definitely an ancient weapon like a Trident. Not a meat fork a all.
lore.excitingenchants.carp: A fish that feeds on dirt. Sounds tasty right?
lore.excitingenchants.cooked_carp: A Cooked carp is still a carp, but not raw.
lore.excitingenchants.parrotfish: A fish that looks beautiful but tastes like an oil leak.
lore.excitingenchants.cooked_parrotfish: Cooked Parrotfish is less colorful but more digestible.
lore.excitingenchants.rare_fish: This Rare Fish is very hard to find. And very ugly and useless.
lore.excitingenchants.real_authentic_mea: Meat from something. You should probably not eat it.
lore.excitingenchants.cooked_real_authen: Cooked Meat from something. You should probably not eat it.
item.excitingenchants.hot_dog.tooltip: Put some Blaze Powder on it and you can't tell the difference.
lore.excitingenchants.hot_dog: Put some Blaze Powder on it and you can't tell the difference.
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_1: If you find this, you lost.
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_3: Kiss me and I'll turn into a frog.
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_6: You want my treasure?  You can have it!
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_7: Help, i'm stuck at the bottom of the water.
lore.excitingenchants.cleansing_soap: Can be used on items to remove curses from them.
enchantment.excitingenchants.earthen_spi: On right-click, summons a spike from the ground that causes the spiked effect.
enchantment.excitingenchants.time_remnan: On right-click, saves the current position, on attack all saved positions attack too.
enchantment.excitingenchants.splatter.de: Shoots projectiles out of targets you hit.
enchantment.excitingenchants.hungry.desc: Automatically eats food for you. Slightly less efficient than eating yourself
enchantment.excitingenchants.diviner.des: Lets you sense aggressive mobs around you.
enchantment.excitingenchants.squid_encou: Sprays ink on attackers when hit.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bulwark.des: Reduces knockback taken but slows movement. Shift to enter a 0 movement reduced damage stance.
enchantment.excitingenchants.dash.desc: Allows you to dash forward by sneaking mid-air.
enchantment.excitingenchants.ender_pocke: Grants access to part of your Ender Chest.
enchantment.excitingenchants.collecting_: Gives a chance to collect incoming projectiles.
enchantment.excitingenchants.buoyant.des: Lets you walk on lava not sneaking.
Spawns clouds below you when jumping while mid-air.
enchantment.excitingenchants.reverberati: Breaks nearby blocks of the same type.
enchantment.excitingenchants.frenzy.desc: Deals extra damage when attacking the same target repeatedly.
enchantment.excitingenchants.soul_retrie: Lets you collect the souls of your kills and use them as shields.
enchantment.excitingenchants.reaping.des: Steals potion effects from the target.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pocket_sand: Lets you throw sand by right-clicking.
enchantment.excitingenchants.trap_digger: Lets you place hidden traps by right-clicking.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pickerang.d: Allows you to throw your pickaxe to mine and attack at a distance.
enchantment.excitingenchants.dequiping.d: Deals very little damage but may remove worn armor.
enchantment.excitingenchants.gravity_imp: Pulls nearby mobs toward you on a smash attack.
enchantment.excitingenchants.roped.desc: Pulls targets closer to you. May attach leads to them.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pinning.des: Pins the target to the ground until they sneak.
enchantment.excitingenchants.trailing.de: Leaves a trail behind flying tipped arrows.
enchantment.excitingenchants.volley.desc: Arrows split into multiple falling arrows when shot upward.
enchantment.excitingenchants.living_wood: Shoots weaker wooden arrows when no arrows are available. Ignores other Enchantments.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bullet_time: You get balloons that grant slow falling while holding this bow.
enchantment.excitingenchants.echoing.des: Loads echo shards to fire a warden-like sonic attack.
enchantment.excitingenchants.sharing.des: Gives one of your potion effects to the target.
enchantment.excitingenchants.galvanizing: Loads lightning rods to fire chain lightning.
Loads cobblestone to fire a spread of small projectiles.
enchantment.excitingenchants.yoinking.de: May steal items from hooked creatures' hands.
enchantment.excitingenchants.barbed_hook: Pins mobs that walk over the bobber.
enchantment.excitingenchants.poseidon.de: Places water wherever the trident lands.
enchantment.excitingenchants.devils_tool: Makes your trident fire-based instead of water-based.
enchantment.excitingenchants.devouring.d: Blocking attacks drains the attacker's hunger.
Teleports you randomly when the shield breaks.
enchantment.excitingenchants.immortality: The shield acts like a totem of undying.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pheromone_s: Applies hallucination effect to hit targets.
enchantment.excitingenchants.sanguine.de: Let's you use your hearts as a Projectile, if you have no arrows.
enchantment.excitingenchants.spiked_stin: Gives hit entities the hallucination Effect.
enchantment.excitingenchants.rubber_band: Randomly teleport you upwards while falling.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bad_bait.de: Makes you unable to catch normal fish.
enchantment.excitingenchants.black_thumb: Makes plants around you wither away.
enchantment.excitingenchants.chorus.desc: Makes the item randomly teleport around.
enchantment.excitingenchants.ghouls.desc: Makes you unable to eat most foods.
enchantment.excitingenchants.midas.desc: Turns everything you touch into gold.
enchantment.excitingenchants.needed_stab: Makes the block sometimes place itself.
enchantment.excitingenchants.nerf.desc: Turns arrows into harmless foam darts.
enchantment.excitingenchants.newton.desc: Blocks around you tend to have gravity applied.
effect.excitingenchants.pinned.descripti: Makes you unable to move. Can be removed by sneaking. On higher levels, deals damage when removing.
effect.excitingenchants.inked.descriptio: Covered in ink, you get slower and your vision gets obstructed.
effect.excitingenchants.castle_mode.desc: Makes you unable to move but increases armor and knockback resistance.
effect.excitingenchants.meat_crazed.desc: Makes you unable to eat anything but meat.
chat.excitingenchants.him.first_equipped: <§kHerobrine§r> So, you have come to see me?
chat.excitingenchants.him.crafting_1: <§kHerobrine§r> Anything you create can be destroyed.
chat.excitingenchants.him.crafting_2: <§kHerobrine§r> Don't think you can hide that from me.
chat.excitingenchants.him.crafting_1.une: <§kHerobrine§r> Your tools wont vanquish me either.
chat.excitingenchants.him.sleeping_1: <§kHerobrine§r> You feel safe enough to sleep?
chat.excitingenchants.him.sleeping_2: <§kHerobrine§r> You can't even escape me in your dreams.
chat.excitingenchants.him.sleeping_3: <§kHerobrine§r> You should rest, while you still can.
chat.excitingenchants.him.sleeping_1.une: <§kHerobrine§r> Do you think you can just sleep me away?
chat.excitingenchants.him.kill_animal_1: <§kHerobrine§r> You kill the innocent so easily.
<§kHerobrine§r> My anger still resides within you.
chat.excitingenchants.him.kill_monster_1: <§kHerobrine§r> Don't think you could defeat me that easily.
<§kHerobrine§r> Still trying to prove your strength?
chat.excitingenchants.him.mining_1.unequ: <§kHerobrine§r> No matter where you dig, you can't escape me.
chat.excitingenchants.him.last_removed_1: <§kHerobrine§r> Do you really think, you can escape me?
chat.excitingenchants.him.death_3: <§kHerobrine§r> Death wont help you escaping me.
chat.excitingenchants.him.join_world_1: <§kHerobrine§r> Welcome back. I've been expecting you.
chat.excitingenchants.him.join_world_3: <§kHerobrine§r> I've watched you in your absence.
